name: Nikolaï Voronov
longDesc: Nikolaï Voronov est un général artillerie de qualité or — URSS. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Artillery Training Master
skills.desc: Increase the HP recovery converted from dealt damage of 3% based on the level of artillery elite force. Critical attack damage of artillery elite force is increased by 25%

skills.name: Hold Fast
skills.desc: Troop morale will not deminish. When there is friendly units nearby within 1 grid, evade 12% damage dealt by enemy

skills.name: Crossfire
skills.desc: Counter attack +24% when attacked by the enemy on land

skills.name: Artillery Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding artillery units

skills.name: Accuracy
skills.desc: Deal +18% damage to the enemy when commanding artillery units

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Nikolaï Voronov is a gold-quality artillery general — USSR. Data extracted from the game — descriptions and tactical notes to be confirmed.
longDescDe: Nikolaï Voronov ist ein Gold-Artillerie-General — UdSSR. Daten aus dem Spiel extrahiert — Beschreibungen und taktische Hinweise noch zu bestätigen.
